title: Infosys Recognized by Whitelane Research for IT Services in European and Nordic Financial Services
detailed_summary: Infosys announced Whitelane Research rankings recognizing it as the number one IT services provider for Banking in Europe and Financial Services in the Nordics. The release also states Infosys was a top three “Exceptional Performer” in Financial Services - Overall and Cloud & Infrastructure Services in Europe. The document is primarily an awards and recognition announcement.

key_facts.fact: Infosys was ranked as number one IT services provider for 'Financial Services - Banking' in the 'Whitelane Research IT Sourcing Study 2025/2026 Financial Services Europe'.
Infosys was ranked as the number one IT services provider for Financial Services in the Nordics by 'Whitelane Research IT Sourcing Study 2026'.
Infosys achieved a score of 83% in general satisfaction among IT service providers serving the European Banking industry, an improvement of three percentage points over 2024/2025.
